styles.css: :host{display:block;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#050915;color:#eef5ff;font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif}.sdui-app{position:fixed;inset:0;display:grid;grid-template-rows:minmax(0,1fr)auto;gap:6px;padding:6px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#081020,#040711)}.sdui-stage{position:relative;min-width:0;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(161,188,236,.18);border-radius:16px;background:#071222}.sdui-stage-port,.sdui-stage canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:block}.sdui-hud{position:absolute;z-index:3;left:10px;top:10px;display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;pointer-events:none}.sdui-chip,.sdui-pill{min-height:24px;padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(165,194,242,.16);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(5,10,19,.72);color:#b8cae9;font-size:10px;font-weight:850;white-space:nowrap}.sdui-chip.ok{color:#baffd7;border-color:rgba(141,240,189,.35);background:rgba(141,240,189,.10)}.sdui-panel{position:absolute;z-index:8;top:10px;right:10px;width:min(320px,calc(100% - 20px));max-height:calc(100% - 82px);overflow:auto;padding:12px;display:grid;align-content:start;gap:10px;border:1px solid rgba(161,188,236,.18);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(9,16,30,.86);box-shadow:0 16px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.28)}.sdui-kicker{color:#7f93b9;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase}.sdui-title{display:block;font-size:18px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.15}.sdui-copy{color:#c5d3ec;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45}.sdui-row,.sdui-segmented,.sdui-transport,.sdui-zoom{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}.sdui-rail{padding:6px 8px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto auto minmax(0,1fr)auto auto;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(161,188,236,.18);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(9,16,30,.82);box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.22)}.sdui-rail input[type=range]{width:100%;accent-color:#8df0bd}.sdui-rail-label{color:#c5d3ec;font-size:11px;font-weight:850;white-space:nowrap}.sdui-segmented{padding:2px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}button{font:inherit;color:inherit;min-width:30px;min-height:30px;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);font-size:11px;font-weight:850;cursor:pointer}button:hover{background:rgba(127,176,255,.16)}.sdui-segmented button[aria-selected=true],.sdui-primary{border-color:rgba(141,240,189,.35)!important;background:rgba(141,240,189,.11)!important;color:#caffdf}.sdui-toast{position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:62px;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:9px 13px;border-radius:999px;background:#0a1222;color:#e8f1ff;opacity:0}.sdui-toast.show{opacity:1}.sdui-machine{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0 0 0 0);clip-path:inset(50%);white-space:nowrap}@media(max-width:760px){.sdui-app{gap:5px;padding:5px}.sdui-stage{border-radius:14px}.sdui-hud{left:7px;top:7px}.sdui-hud .sdui-chip:nth-child(n+4){display:none}.sdui-panel{left:8px;right:8px;top:auto;bottom:52px;width:auto;max-height:min(48vh,420px)}.sdui-rail{grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr)auto;gap:6px}.sdui-rail .sdui-segmented,.sdui-rail .sdui-zoom{display:none}.sdui-rail-label{font-size:10px}}
